system.name: Vedic Compatibility Analysis
system.description: Comprehensive relationship and marriage compatibility assessment
system.purpose: Evaluate compatibility for harmonious relationships and marriage
system.importance: Critical for long-term relationship success and family harmony
system.scope: Covers mental, physical, emotional, spiritual, and karmic compatibility
system.vedicReferences: Muhurta Chintamani, Vivaha Vrinda, Jataka Tatva, Hora Shastra
system.modernRelevance: Ancient wisdom applicable to modern relationships

ashtakootSystem.name: Ashtakoot Guna Milan (Eight-fold Compatibility)
ashtakootSystem.description: Eight factors scored based on Moon nakshatra compatibility
ashtakootSystem.principle: Higher score indicates better natural compatibility
ashtakootSystem.calculation: Based on boy's and girl's birth Moon nakshatra positions

kutas.name: Varna Kuta
kutas.scoringRule: Boy's varna should be equal or higher than girl's for 1 point
kutas.modernInterpretation: Ego and temperament compatibility - equal or complementary personalities work better
kutas.lowScoreEffect: Ego clashes, temperament differences, spiritual direction conflicts

kutas.name: Vashya Kuta
kutas.scoringRule: 2 points if mutual attraction strong, 1 if one-way, 0 if incompatible
kutas.modernInterpretation: Natural chemistry, attraction patterns, dominance dynamics
kutas.lowScoreEffect: Lack of mutual attraction, control issues, incompatible energies

kutas.name: Tara Kuta
kutas.description: Birth star compatibility and mutual fortune
kutas.principle: 27 nakshatras create 9 taras showing mutual influence
kutas.calculation: Count from girl's nakshatra to boy's nakshatra, divide by 9, check remainder
kutas.scoringRule: 3 points if both directions favorable, 1.5 if one direction favorable, 0 if both unfavorable
kutas.modernInterpretation: Luck and fortune partners bring to each other, karmic connection
kutas.lowScoreEffect: Bad luck for each other, obstacles multiply, unfortunate timing

kutas.name: Yoni Kuta
kutas.principle: Animal nature determines physical and intimate compatibility

relationships.examples: Natural enemies - Cat vs Rat, Mongoose vs Serpent, Deer vs Dog

kutas.scoringRule: 4 points for friendly/same, 2 for neutral, 0 for enemies
kutas.modernInterpretation: Physical intimacy compatibility, sexual nature matching, biological rhythm
kutas.lowScoreEffect: Sexual incompatibility, physical disharmony, intimate relationship struggles

kutas.name: Graha Maitri Kuta
kutas.principle: Moon sign lords' friendship determines mental harmony
kutas.calculation: Check relationship between boy's Moon sign lord and girl's Moon sign lord

relationships.effect: Perfect mental harmony, same thinking patterns

relationships.type: Both lords neutral to each other

kutas.modernInterpretation: Mental wavelength, communication ease, thought process compatibility
kutas.lowScoreEffect: Mental conflicts, communication breakdowns, thinking pattern incompatibility
kutas.importance: Critical for emotional and mental relationship success

kutas.name: Gana Kuta
kutas.principle: Three basic temperaments that must harmonize

ganas.nature: Godly, sattvic, pure, kind, charitable, religious
Human-like, rajasic, mixed good and bad, worldly

compatibility.effect: Perfect harmony, mutual understanding, peaceful life
Perfect match, mutual strength, power couple
Most difficult, opposite temperaments, requires conscious effort

kutas.exception: If girl is Deva and boy is Rakshasa, it's worse than reverse
kutas.modernInterpretation: Behavioral style, aggression level, temperament harmony
kutas.lowScoreEffect: Temperament clashes, behavioral conflicts, lifestyle incompatibility
kutas.importance: Very important for daily life harmony

kutas.name: Bhakoot Kuta
kutas.description: Emotional and health compatibility, family welfare
kutas.principle: Rasi position relationship affects health and prosperity
kutas.calculation: Count signs from girl's Moon rasi to boy's Moon rasi

positions.effect: Financial and family troubles, health issues

exceptions: Same Moon sign but different nakshatras can be acceptable
Certain specific combinations like Aries-Scorpio (both Mars) get points
kutas.modernInterpretation: Emotional wavelength, family happiness, health harmony
kutas.lowScoreEffect: Family problems, health issues for spouse, emotional disconnect, financial troubles
kutas.importance: Very critical - affects health and prosperity
kutas.seriousness: Low score here is a major concern

kutas.name: Nadi Kuta
kutas.description: Genetic compatibility, health of progeny, physiological harmony
kutas.principle: Three nadis represent Vata, Pitta, Kapha doshas - must be different

scoringRule.effect: Perfect genetic compatibility, healthy children, physiological harmony
Genetic incompatibility, health issues in children, physiological problems

kutas.seriousness: Most serious dosha - same Nadi is major red flag
exceptions: Both have same rasi but different nakshatras
Both have same nakshatra but different padas/rasis
Both have same rasi lord (some texts)
kutas.modernInterpretation: Genetic compatibility, biological harmony, progeny health
kutas.remedies: Very difficult to remedy - considered most serious among all kutas
kutas.importance: Absolutely critical - many astrologers reject matches with Nadi dosha

interpretationGuidelines.rule: Even high score problematic if critical kutas score zero

mangalDosha.name: Mangal Dosha (Mars Affliction)
mangalDosha.importance: Highly emphasized in North India, less in South India (where more dashas checked)
mangalDosha.description: Mars in certain houses causes aggression and marital discord
mangalDosha.principle: Mars' malefic influence in sensitive houses affects marital happiness

affectedHouses.effect: Aggressive personality, ego issues, dominance problems
Harsh speech, family conflicts, wealth disputes
Home conflicts, property disputes, mother issues
Direct impact on spouse and marriage
affectedHouses.impact: Marital discord, separation tendencies, spouse health
Sudden marriage troubles, spouse longevity issues

cancellations.effect: Dosha cancels - both understand each other's Mars energy

cancellations.condition: Strong Jupiter or Venus aspect on Mars

cancellations.effect: Variable reduction based on aspect strength

checkFrom: Must check from all three for complete analysis
misconceptions: Myth: Manglik causes death of spouse - Reality: Rarely fatal, usually causes discord
Myth: Manglik should never marry non-Manglik - Reality: Cancellations and remedies work
Myth: Permanent curse - Reality: Reduces after Mars maturity age (28)
Myth: All Mars in these houses - Reality: Strength, aspects, cancellations matter
remedies: Kumbh Vivah (symbolic marriage to tree/idol before actual marriage)
Mars remedies: Hanuman worship, red lentil donation, Mars mantras
Wear red coral (if Mars is beneficial)
mangalDosha.modernPerspective: Mars creates assertiveness which needs compatible partner who understands/matches energy

techniques.name: Navamsa (D9) Compatibility
techniques.importance: Very high - shows actual marital happiness
techniques.description: D9 is marriage chart - compatibility here more important than D1
checks: 7th house strength in both D9 charts
Venus position in both D9 charts
Benefics vs malefics in 7th house D9
D9 lagna lord strength - overall marital compatibility
techniques.principle: Strong D9 compatibility ensures lasting marital harmony
techniques.application: Even good Ashtakoot with bad D9 can fail; good D9 can overcome poor Ashtakoot

techniques.name: Darakaraka Compatibility
techniques.description: Lowest degree planet (except Rahu) indicates spouse
analysis: Cross-check: His DK with her chart, Her DK with his chart
techniques.interpretation: DK shows spouse nature and what they bring to marriage

techniques.name: Upapada Lagna Compatibility
techniques.description: Upapada (UL/A7) shows actual marriage experience and circumstances
techniques.calculation: Count from 12th lord's house to 12th lord, count same from lagna
checks: UL lord strength in both charts
Planets in UL in both charts
techniques.significance: Even good 7th house with bad UL indicates marriage struggles

techniques.name: Dasha Compatibility
techniques.importance: Critical for timing and compatibility phases
techniques.description: Check if both running compatible dashas at marriage and beyond
analysis: Check if one's bad dasha coincides with other's good (balancing)
techniques.principle: Smooth dashas for both = smooth married life; if one difficult, other should be supportive
techniques.example: Marrying in Venus-Jupiter for both = excellent; marrying in Saturn-Rahu for both = challenging start

techniques.name: Kakshya Compatibility
techniques.description: Sub-divisions within each rasi for precise matching
techniques.analysis: Check SAV kakshya compatibility in 7th house and Venus position

techniques.name: Graha Lagna Compatibility
techniques.description: Additional compatibility check from Graha Lagna (most planets)
techniques.checks: Run Ashtakoot from Graha Lagna as alternate check

techniques.name: Synastry Analysis
techniques.description: Compare planetary positions between two charts
checks: His Jupiter with her Jupiter (shared philosophy)
His Saturn with her Saturn (shared responsibilities)
techniques.principle: Inter-chart planetary relationships show day-to-day compatibility

techniques.name: Composite Chart
techniques.description: Midpoint chart showing the relationship itself
techniques.usage: Shows the relationship's destiny separate from individuals

types.challenge: Love needs to sustain into marriage - check marriage factors too
types.analysis: Strong 5th but weak 7th = great dating, difficult marriage

types.avoidFactor: Check for 6th/8th house mutual afflictions (conflicts, cheating)

types.analysis: Less stringent than marriage - Graha Maitri and Gana sufficient
Check parent's 5th house and child's chart compatibility
types.karmic: Often karmic bonds shown in D60 (Shashtyamsa)

types.indicators: Strong 9th house connections, Jupiter harmony, spiritual compatibility

timingMarriage.name: Marriage Timing Using Compatibility
timingMarriage.principle: Good compatibility + right timing = successful marriage

bestTimings.ideal: Venus, Jupiter, Mercury dashas for both
bestTimings.avoid: Rahu, Ketu, Saturn major dashas (unless very strong)

bestTimings.ideal: Jupiter transiting 7th house or over Venus/Moon for both
bestTimings.avoid: Saturn transiting 7th house, Rahu-Ketu on 1st-7th axis

bestTimings.ideal: Good Muntha position in 7th for both in marriage year
bestTimings.check: Annual chart should support marriage for both

bestTimings.principle: Individual timing must align for both

bestTimings.modern: Equal age or near works if charts compatible

muhurta.name: Marriage Muhurta (Electional Time)
muhurta.importance: Selecting auspicious time for marriage ceremony
factors: Benefic vara (day) - Monday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday best
Avoid Rahu Kaal, Yamaganda, Gulika Kaal
muhurta.principle: Good muhurta strengthens weak compatibility; poor muhurta weakens strong compatibility

remedies.name: Compatibility Remedies

remedies.for: Jupiter weak (lack of wisdom in marriage)

remedies: NOTE: Very difficult to remedy completely
Understanding each other's dashas and being supportive
Wait for better dasha period before marriage
Choose excellent muhurta to compensate weak compatibility
Start marriage journey during favorable transits
Plan important events during good joint transits
Extra care during difficult transits for either partner
Swayamvara Parvati puja (for finding right spouse)
Visit couple deity temples (Tirupati, Madurai, etc.)
Perform remedies on specific tithis favorable for marriage

remedies.principle: Remedies work best when combined with conscious effort and understanding
remedies.limitation: Remedies can reduce doshas but cannot completely change destiny
remedies.recommendation: Focus on improving compatibility through understanding rather than just rituals

modernConsiderations.name: Modern Approach to Compatibility

points.synthesis: Both partners support each other's growth while maintaining family harmony
Check Mercury and 3rd house for communication compatibility
points.importance: Modern marriages need strong Graha Maitri (mental compatibility)

points.synthesis: Yoni Kuta + Mars-Venus compatibility + 8th house analysis
points.importance: Physical compatibility more openly acknowledged today

points.synthesis: Check both 10th houses for mutual career support
points.compatibility: Partners should support each other's ambitions

points.analysis: Love marriages check 5th house first, then 7th house; arranged check 7th primarily

points.astrological: Check 6th/8th house afflictions to 7th house, Rahu's role, weak 7th lord
points.remedies: Try remedies and counseling first; if chart shows impossible compatibility, separation may be karmic

points.analysis: Check dasha phase compatibility more than age number

points.approach: Use same compatibility principles - check 7th house, Venus, Mars, Ashtakoot, dashas; core principles remain same

modernConsiderations.emphasis: Astrology reveals natural compatibility; conscious effort and love can overcome many challenges
modernConsiderations.wisdom: Perfect compatibility rare; understanding and working with differences is key

redFlags.name: Serious Compatibility Red Flags
redFlags.description: Warning signs that suggest avoiding the match

criticalIssues.action: Strongly avoid unless definite exception exists
criticalIssues.exceptions: Same rasi different nakshatra, same nakshatra different pada/rasi

criticalIssues.consequences: Health issues, family problems, emotional disconnect
criticalIssues.action: Avoid unless strong remedies and other factors excellent
criticalIssues.exceptions: Certain specific sign combinations, strong Navamsa

criticalIssues.action: One Manglik with one non-Manglik risky
criticalIssues.solution: Both should be Manglik or remedies must be done

criticalIssues.exception: Rare cases with exceptional Navamsa and dasha compatibility

criticalIssues.action: Requires strong compatibility in other areas to compensate
criticalIssues.workable: More workable than Nadi/Bhakoot if both willing to adjust

criticalIssues.issue: Both running malefic dashas at marriage time
criticalIssues.action: Delay marriage until one person enters better dasha
criticalIssues.timing: Timing is crucial - right match at wrong time fails

criticalIssues.action: D9 analysis essential - poor D9 suggests avoiding
criticalIssues.importance: D9 more important than D1 for marriage

criticalIssues.issue: Severe Venus affliction in both charts
criticalIssues.action: Individual chart problems compound in combination
criticalIssues.remedy: Strengthen Venus for both before marriage

criticalIssues.workable: Can work if both spiritually mature

criticalIssues.consequences: Loss, separation tendencies, bed pleasure issues
criticalIssues.nature: May indicate physical distance or emotional unavailability
criticalIssues.workable: Can work if conscious and other factors strong

redFlags.principle: One major red flag may be manageable; multiple red flags suggest avoiding the match
redFlags.wisdom: Astrology shows compatibility; forcing incompatible matches leads to suffering for both

successFactors.name: Indicators of Highly Successful Marriage

greenFlags.significance: Excellent natural compatibility across multiple dimensions

greenFlags.indicator: Good Graha Maitri and Gana Kuta

greenFlags.significance: Love, wisdom, and fortune in relationship

greenFlags.indicator: Strong Upapada Lagna in both charts

successFactors.idealScenario: High Ashtakoot + Strong D9 + Compatible Dashas + Excellent Muhurta = Highly successful marriage
successFactors.reality: Perfect match rare; good compatibility + conscious effort = successful marriage
